"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\trading_server.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw32\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\trading_server.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\trading_server.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw32\bin\gcc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\trading_server.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o trading_server.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtrading_server.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\trading_server.dir\linkLibs.rsp
